title: TotalEnergies Courtenay: 22 jaar van uitsonderlike diens
bodyText:
Advertorial
                            Gallery

BESIGHEIDSNUUS - Vir die afgelope 22 jaar, het Albert en Maryke Neizel, saam met hul toegewyde span, die gemeenskap van George bedien met vriendelike diens en ‘n wye reeks produkte en dienste.


> By TotalEnergies Courtenay, is die visie om ‘n “one-stop destination” te skep vir brandstof, gas, hout, kruideniersware, koffie, en vars gebak. Alles word gedoen om klante se dae op te helder en hul behoeftes met sorg te vervul.


FOTOGALERY: Uitsonderlike diens by TotalEnergies Courtenay

TotalEnergies Courtenay bied net nie vriendelike diens nie, maar ook ’n wye reeks aanbiedinge:


> Loyalty programmes


At TotalEnergies Courtenay, several loyalty programmes are available to help customers earn and spend rewards:

- Dis-Chem Benefit Card: Earn 10c per litre on the forecourt and redeem your rewards at Dis-Chem.
- TotalEnergies Club: Earn 30c per litre (previously 15c) and redeem your rewards at the Total forecourt.
- OK Count on Card: Earn R1 per litre on Sundays and 25c per litre Mondays to Saturdays on the forecourt. Additionally, earn 2% cashback on OK Express purchases (5% for pensioners).  Redeem the rewards on the forecourt, OK Express and Mugg & Bean on the Move.


> Mugg & Bean on the Move


Mugg & Bean on the Move is the perfect stop for a quick cappuccino, freshly baked jumbo muffin, delicious toasted sandwich and now also for a slice of your favourite Mugg & Bean cake (carrot / cheesecake /lemon meringue).  The new summer menu was launched end of October and offers a variety of mouthwatering drinks and meals.

The Mugg & Bean Loyalty App allows customers the convenience of purchasing a coffee subscription and getting a delicious Easy Cappuccino for less than R20 … any time of the day.  Customers who are in a hurry, can order ahead on the App, pay in advance and just stop & collect.

We have also partnered with Mr D for the convenience of having food & drinks delivered to your office or home.

We are looking forward to upgrade the Mugg & Bean on the Move to a Mugg & Bean on the Move Limited Service early in 2025. This will entail a wider menu offering and more provision for seating.

Mugg & Bean on the Move business hours are 05:00 – 19:00 on Mondays to Fridays and 06:00 – 18:00 on Saturdays & Sundays.


> OK Express George


OK Express George was recently awarded the title of OK Express of the Year 2024 at a conference in Rio de Janeiro. This achievement was made possible thanks to our dedicated team, who work tirelessly 24/7 to deliver exceptional service.

As part of the Shoprite Checkers Group, we offer popular brands such as Simple Truth, Pot o’ Gold, and The Bakery at competitive prices. Our Grab & Go section is the perfect solution for freshly prepared meals, takeaways and sweet treats.


> Rybaandiens


Ons brandstofjoggies, met hul kenmer-kende rooi vlae en vriendelike glimlagte, help graag met brandstof, vensters was, olie- en waterkontrole, gasvervanging en swaar items dra.

Ons Win Fuel for a Year-kompetisie het elke maand twee gelukkige wenners, en die groot trekking vind plaas op 15 Desember. Maak seker jy neem deel voor 30 November om te kwalifiseer vir hierdie ongelooflike prys!


> Gewilde produkte op die perseel


- 24/7 Gas: Ons aanvaar die meeste leë silinders en bied aflewering aan.
- Woodies: Topkwaliteit kaggel- en braaihout vir die kieskeurige braaier.
- Water on Tap: Slegs 99c/liter.
- Grow Green: Kompos, potting soil, lawn dressing, bas en kraalmis.


> Thank You, George!


The management and owners of TotalEnergies Courtenay would like to sincerely thank the community of George for their support over the past 22 years.

May you have a blessed festive season filled with special moments with your loved ones.

We look forward to continue providing you with the best service in 2025.

We appreciate you!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
